plugins.name: cure-product-engineering
plugins.description: Complete product engineering skill library — 64 skills, 31 agents (engineering, product, marketing, business, data, security), 11 rules, 9 output styles, multi-layer hooks with agent auto-triggering (14 events), MCP + LSP servers. Standards for Android, iOS, Web, Firebase, Python, Go, Rust, Docker, Terraform, and cloud infrastructure.
